title: The Navy Closes In
description: On pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this part focuses on the farewell plan. Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Farewell Plan sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Vivi, Crocodile, Luffy, Zoro, Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Turn into rubble along with this temple!

summary: Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
